sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 86:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 86:1
items.html: The uppermost hall in the seven halls of Beria, which incorporates KHBD of Beria, the innermost in them is called the holy of holies. (Part 3, Chapter 7, item 7)
